_comment: Approved n8n endpoint allowlist. No secrets — only env var names. All values enforced by audit_n8n_payload.py before dispatch. This file is a forbidden write path at runtime (governance/forbidden_paths.json). Changes require a human commit and CI pass.

content__tiktok_repost_daily.description: Triggers daily TikTok repost workflow. Accepts a single video ID, optional caption override, and optional schedule slot.

content__ig_crosspost.description: Cross-posts video to Instagram Reels. Platforms field is a list constrained to ['instagram'].

content__of_nurture_sequence.description: Triggers an OnlyFans nurture sequence by sequence ID. No subscriber PII in payload — IDs only.

reporting__weekly_revenue_summary.description: Triggers weekly revenue summary generation in n8n. Output is a report, not a financial action.

_excluded_categories.note: The following action types must NOT be added to this file. They are governed by the Money Key pattern and require human execution.
